title: Fluffy Floral Honey Greek Stir-fry
description: This floral and fluffy date-night greek dish is gluten-free-friendly and features a caramelized honey marinade.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the honey, Leah's Garlic Spread, and Mediterranean Blend Salad Dressing. Add in sliced almonds and fresh mint leaves.
Chop sun-dried dates into small pieces and place them in a large mixing bowl.
Add the mixed marinade to the date mixture and stir until all of the dates are coated evenly with the honey and spread.
Place the yogurt in a blender or food processor. Add in 1/4 cup of the marinade, and blend until smooth.
Pour the blended yogurt over the marinated dates and toss gently to coat everything well.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Once hot, pour the yogurt mixture into the pan and stir occasionally until it thickens and turns golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
Serve warm as a side dish or on top of other dishes.
